title: Kerio Valley Viewpoints
description: Dramatic escarpment views and running trails above the Rift — barely on international itineraries.
highlights:
Escarpment panoramas
Runner culture
Low costs
Community guides
directions: Bus to Eldoret or Iten, boda to viewpoint ridges.
what_to_carry: Camera, wind layer, cash for guide.
why_special: One of Africa's great escarpment views
unique_experiences: Sunrise ridge walk with local runners

title: Lamu Old Town
description: UNESCO Swahili stone town with no cars — dhow culture and alley cafes on a backpacker budget.
highlights:
UNESCO old town
Dhow harbour
No vehicles
Budget guesthouses
directions: Bus Nairobi–Mombasa–Lamu road, then dhow to Lamu Island; or fly budget when on sale.
public_transport: Bus + boat KES 3,000–4,500; airport taxi short.
road_conditions: Sand streets; boat only on island.
safety_and_conditions: Respect Muslim culture — modest dress in town.
what_to_carry: Cash, light clothing, dry bag for boat.
travel_tips: Guesthouses from KES 2,500 — ask for fan rooms.
why_hidden: Many skip for Diani beaches only
unique_experiences: Sunset dhow sail, alley food tours

title: Kit Mikayi
description: Sacred granite rock formation near Kisumu — cultural stories and lake views for pocket change.
highlights:
Sacred rock
Luo heritage
Lake Victoria views
Low entry
directions: Bus to Kisumu, matatu towards Bondo drop Kit Mikayi, short walk.
safety_and_conditions: Rock scrambling sections — wear grippy shoes.
travel_tips: Combine with Kisumu sunset at Hippo Point.

title: Rusinga Island
description: Lake Victoria island with fossils, fishing villages, and quiet homestays off the tourist track.
highlights:
Lake island
Fishing culture
Homestays
Fossil sites
directions: Bus to Homa Bay/Mbita, ferry or boat to Rusinga.
safety_and_conditions: Lake weather changes fast — secure boats daylight.
travel_tips: Tom Mboya mausoleum worth a stop.
unique_experiences: Village fish fry, island bike loop

title: Marafa Depression
description: Surreal sandstone canyon nicknamed Hell's Kitchen — guided walks near Malindi on a shoestring.
highlights:
Sandstone canyon
Sunset colours
Local guides
Low entry
directions: Bus Nairobi–Malindi, matatu/tuk-tuk to Marafa village.
safety_and_conditions: Canyon edges crumble — follow guide only.

title: Lake Paradise Marsabit
description: Forest-ringed crater lake in remote northern Marsabit — adventure for patient budget overlanders.
highlights:
Crater lake
Forest elephants
Remote north
Overlander route
map_query: Lake Paradise Marsabit National Park Kenya
directions: Bus Nairobi–Isiolo–Marsabit; 4x4 or park vehicle to lake.
safety_and_conditions: Remote — carry water and fuel. Elephants in forest.
travel_tips: Allow 3 days travel buffer from Nairobi.

title: Ol Karia Geothermal Spa
description: Natural hot pool in Hell's Gate geothermal field — soak after a gorge hike for almost nothing.
highlights:
Hot pool soak
Geothermal steam
Post-hike relax
Local fee
map_query: Ol Karia Geothermal Spa Naivasha Kenya
directions: Matatu to Naivasha, boda to Ol Karia spa gate near geothermal plant road.
safety_and_conditions: Test water temperature; sulfur smell normal.
travel_tips: Pair with Hell's Gate same day ticket area.
why_special: Natural spa in Rift geothermal zone

title: Lukenya Hills
description: Granite boulders and scout trails — climbing and scrambling an hour from Nairobi.
highlights:
Boulder fields
Climbing
Near Nairobi
Low fees
directions: Matatu to Athi River/Kitengela, boda to Lukenya gate.

title: Mfangano Island
description: Rock art and fishing villages on Lake Victoria — slow travel homestay island.
highlights:
Rock art sites
Fishing villages
Island bikes
Homestays
directions: Bus to Mbita, ferry to Mfangano, boda to guesthouse.
safety_and_conditions: Lake travel daylight; life jackets on boats.
travel_tips: Community tourism office arranges rock art guide.

title: Lake Magadi Hot Springs
description: Soda lake pink shores and natural hot springs at the Rift's southern edge — day trip from Nairobi.
highlights:
Pink soda lake
Hot springs
Maasai landscape
Day trip
directions: Matatu/bus towards Kiserian–Magadi road; company bus sometimes from town.
road_conditions: Rough magadi road; corrosive dust near lake.
safety_and_conditions: Hot springs burn — test first. Sharp soda flats — wear shoes.
what_to_carry: Water, hat, old swimwear for springs.
unique_experiences: Hot spring soak with Maasai guides

title: Gede Ruins
description: Swahili medieval town swallowed by forest — quiet history stop near Watamu beaches.
highlights:
Swahili ruins
Forest monkeys
Museum
Budget combo with coast
directions: Bus to Malindi/Watamu, tuk-tuk to Gede ruins gate.
travel_tips: Morning cool and fewer tour buses.

title: Ndaraca ya Ngai
description: Natural rock bridge and waterfall in Kirinyaga — faith pilgrimage site with forest walk.
highlights:
Rock bridge
Waterfall
Forest walk
Cultural site
directions: Matatu Nairobi–Embu/Kutus, boda to forest trail.
safety_and_conditions: Slippery near falls; respectful behaviour at sacred site.

title: Lake Jipe
description: Shallow border lake with papyrus channels — canoe birding far from safari circuits.
highlights:
Canoe birding
Papyrus channels
Border lake
Quiet wildlife
directions: Bus to Taveta, arrange canoe at lakeside village.
safety_and_conditions: Hippos in channels — go with experienced canoe guide.

title: Koromosho Falls
description: Hidden cascade in Elgeyo-Marakwet with cliff viewpoints — combine with Kerio Valley trip.
highlights:
Cliff waterfall
Valley views
Adventure hike
Low fees
directions: Base in Iten; hire guide and boda to trailhead.
public_transport: Bus to Iten KES 800+; local guide KES 600.

title: Tigoni Tea Walks
description: Cool climate tea farm footpaths in Limuru — afternoon walks and factory tea cheap from Nairobi.
highlights:
Tea plantations
Cool climate
Near Nairobi
Factory visits
directions: Matatu to Limuru/Tigoni, walk plantation roads with local guide.
safety_and_conditions: Misty and muddy in rains — wear boots.
what_to_carry: Rain jacket, cash for tea tasting.
travel_tips: Weekend tea factory tours need booking.
why_hidden: Locals know; tourists skip for big parks
